description: Container for executor sub-agents (backend, db, integration, ml, refactor, testing, ui). Each executor implements a segment from the execution graph.

segment.source: execution-graph.json segment object passed by the execute skill

acceptance_criteria_text.source: Extracted from spec.md based on segment criteria_ids

prevention_rules.source: Filtered from dynos_patterns.md Prevention Rules section matching executor type

evidence/{segment-id}.md.description: Evidence file documenting files modified, integration points wired, failure cases handled, config/env required, and acceptance criteria satisfied
